title: Create core/session.py - Session management module

changes.description: Created Session class with workflow_id, session_id, status, context attributes; SessionManager class for session lifecycle management

verification.criterion: Session class has workflow_id, session_id, status, context attributes
verification.method: Session instance created with all required attributes

verification.criterion: Session provides task tracking via task_ids list
Session has to_dict() and from_dict() methods for persistence

notes: Follows delegate/session.py pattern but with workflow-level scope
